steps.title: Confirm the current stable worker revision has passed the required lint and build checks, or record an explicit hotfix exception for lint before continuing
Run the targeted local verification commands that exercise the files and behaviors changed on the worker branch
Verify that any touched runtime or server entrypoint parses and starts cleanly on the worker surface
Start the worker-local preview or runtime surface needed to exercise the changed behavior
Use `agent-browser` to verify the changed behavior on the worker-local surface; if there are no UI changes, verify Agent Chat or the relevant runtime surface
Capture a worker-local verification screenshot before the revision can be treated as verified
Summarize what the worker-local verification screenshot shows
What is the worker-local verification outcome?

decision.prompt: What is the worker-local verification outcome?
